name: opt-next
author: lordshashank
notes: arm64 hand-scheduled Montgomery mul/sqr asm (1.40x field-mul throughput on Apple M-series; gate is currently Apple-silicon-only, so it is dormant on the canonical Neoverse runner); route single-threaded MSMs to legacy Pippenger (the round-parallel rewrite loses 16-20% at 1 thread on Apple arm64); fused Shplonk quotient accumulation + early A_0 release; consume the circuit builder during PK construction with staged polynomial allocation. Claims below were measured on Apple M-series (advisory). See https://github.com/lordshashank/aztec-packages/pull/2 and RESEARCH.md.
